name: agentos-starter-repo
description: Desktop-first agentic project operating system starter repo

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @agentos/desktop
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @agentos/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @agentos/policy-engine && npm run build --workspace @agentos/project-scanner && npm run build --workspace @agentos/status-bundle && npm run build --workspace @agentos/task-engine && npm run build --workspace @agentos/task-store
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspace @agentos/desktop && npm run typecheck:packages
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck --workspace @agentos/shared-types && npm run typecheck --workspace @agentos/policy-engine && npm run typecheck --workspace @agentos/project-scanner && npm run typecheck --workspace @agentos/status-bundle && npm run typecheck --workspace @agentos/task-engine && npm run typecheck --workspace @agentos/task-store
